Cases_Confirmed_Nantucket_County: Data from CDC via tickcheck.com; confirmed cases only. Nantucket historically one of highest incidence areas in US (epicenter of early recognition). 2001 study: 15% lifetime prevalence among residents (higher in females). True cases likely higher due to underreporting. Part of Dukes & Nantucket combined in some MA reports with low recent numbers due to small population (~14k) and possible reporting.
